text:
Team USA gymnast Jordan Chiles is still fighting to get herbronze medalback.

The Paris Olympian filed an appeal of the decision that saw the Court of Arbitration for Sport (CAS) force her to cede her third-place title in the floor event to Ana BГ„Вғrbosu of Romania, per an announcement made by her attorneys on Monday.ГӮ

Chiles is now appealing the decision in Switzerland, where CAS is headquartered.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңFrom start to finish, the procedures leading to the CAS panelГўВҖВҷs decision were fundamentally unfair, and it is no surprise that they resulted in an unjust decision,ГўВҖВқ the athlete's lawyers said in a statement,per CNN.ГӮВ ГўВҖВңChiles believes in competing fairly and with integrity and holding these organizations to the standards and rules that were established to ensure fairness,ГўВҖВқ Chiles' legal team continued.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңJordan ChilesГўВҖВҷ appeals present the international community with an easy legal questionГўВҖВ”will everyone stand by while an Olympic athlete who has done only the right thing is stripped of her medal because of fundamental unfairness in an ad-hoc arbitration process? The answer to that question should be no,ГўВҖВқ said Chiles' lawyer, Maurice M. Suh.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңEvery part of the Olympics, including the arbitration process, should stand for fair play,ГўВҖВқ Suh added," Suh added.

The United States Olympic and Paralympic Committee (USOPC) had openly supported Chiles in her mission to see her medal reinstated.ГӮВ ГўВҖВңDue to the egregious errors and oversight by CAS in handling the case and overlooking clear evidence of JordanГўВҖВҷs rightful Bronze win, we are determined to ensure she receives the recognition she deserves. Our commitment to truth in this matter remains steadfast,ГўВҖВқ the USPOC told CNN.ГӮ
